name: Ubiquiti PoE Audio Port
title: Ubiquiti PoE Audio Port
short_description: Easy Audio Integration. The Ubiquiti UniFi PoE Audio Port (UPL-Port-B) is a compact and convenient device designed to bring high-quality audio streaming into the UniFi ecosystem. It is powered through Power over Ethernet, so it only needs one network cable for both power and data.
description: The Ubiquiti UniFi PoE Audio Port (UPL-Port-B) is a compact and convenient device designed to bring high-quality audio streaming into the UniFi ecosystem. It is powered through Power over Ethernet, so it only needs one network cable for both power and data. This makes installation quick and tidy with no extra adapters required. The device supports popular streaming services such as Apple AirPlay, Spotify Connect, and Soundtrack Your Brand, allowing easy playback of music in homes, offices, or commercial spaces. It delivers clear mono or stereo sound with PCM surround format, providing excellent audio quality for different environments. Thanks to its small size and light weight, the Audio Port can be placed almost anywhere. It’s a simple, flexible, and reliable way to create a smart audio system that fits perfectly into the UniFi platform.

detailed_description.heading: Easy Audio Integration
detailed_description.text: The Ubiquiti UniFi PoE Audio Port (UPL-Port-B) is a compact and convenient device designed to bring high-quality audio streaming into the UniFi ecosystem. It is powered through Power over Ethernet, so it only needs one network cable for both power and data. This makes installation quick and tidy with no extra adapters required. The device supports popular streaming services such as Apple AirPlay, Spotify Connect, and Soundtrack Your Brand, allowing easy playback of music in homes, offices, or commercial spaces. It delivers clear mono or stereo sound with PCM surround format, providing excellent audio quality for different environments. Thanks to its small size and light weight, the Audio Port can be placed almost anywhere. It’s a simple, flexible, and reliable way to create a smart audio system that fits perfectly into the UniFi platform.

detailed_description.heading: Flexible Connection Options
detailed_description.text: The UniFi PoE Audio Port offers a wide range of connections, making it easy to integrate with different types of sound equipment. It includes two RCA analog inputs (L/R), an HDMI eARC input, an optical input, and a USB-C port that can be used for both input and output. These options let users connect everything from microphones and mixers to smartphones, computers, or gaming consoles. For output, the device features two RCA analog outputs (L/R), an optical output, and the same USB-C port, which can send sound to amplifiers, headphones, speakers, or DAC converters. Whether you want to play background music in a restaurant or send announcements across multiple zones, the UPL-Port-B gives you flexibility and control. It’s built to deliver smooth, high-quality sound while staying easy to connect and configure with other UniFi audio devices.

detailed_description.heading: Smart Control and Scalability
detailed_description.text: The UPL-Port-B is managed through the UniFi Play app, which provides a simple and centralized way to control your entire audio system. You can configure settings, manage multiple zones, and monitor performance from one interface. The device supports up to 32 PoE Audio Ports and PowerAmps, making it easy to expand your setup as your needs grow. This scalability makes it perfect for offices, schools, restaurants, or other large spaces that need synchronized sound in different areas. Built from durable polycarbonate, the UPL-Port-B is designed to last and works reliably in a temperature range of -5°C to 40°C. It also meets CE, FCC, and IC certification standards, ensuring safe and dependable performance. Combined with easy management, stable operation, and flexible scalability, the UniFi PoE Audio Port provides a professional yet user-friendly audio solution for modern environments.
